economic_notes: Gaming Commission operates video lottery terminals, convenience store, gaming facility and gas bar on reserve. Commercial Fisheries operates two lobster vessels and maintains four lobster licences. Webster Farms Limited (GBE) operates as an agricultural enterprise in Nova Scotia. AVFN Forestry Group Limited Partnership and AVFN Development Group GP Ltd. also consolidated. Solar project funded by Ulnooweg loan.
notes: Audit is qualified due to non-adoption of PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations as management had not completed its assessment by the audit report date. Annual surplus is negative (-165,836) driven by a loss from GBE (Webster Farms Limited) of 823,810. Prior year (2022) included a land claim settlement of 8,028,029 in revenue and 1,491,252 paid to members as expense, making prior year figures not comparable. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. expenses_salaries_total includes salaries (2,348,341) and employee benefits (128,806). Social housing expenses extracted from Statement of Operations line. Restricted cash includes CMHC Replacement Reserve and trust funds held by Federal Government.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
